_changelog._note_gmgn_security: 2026-06-02 GMGN security skill integration. Bot had no honeypot/rug detection — only top10/bundler/bot filters. Added /v1/token/security fetch in Stage 3 (parallel with holders/traders) with analyzeTokenSecurity(). Hard reject on is_honeypot=yes (always on). Soft reject on rug_ratio>0.3, buy_tax>10%, sell_tax>10%, sniper_count>20 (all configurable). Renounced owner/mint/freeze check defaults to soft warning (configurable to hard via requireRenouncedOwner/Mint/FreezeAccount). Security fields surfaced in LLM prompt via formatGmgnCandidateForPrompt (Security: owner_renounced | mint_NOT_renounced | buy_tax=... etc).
_changelog.gmgn_security_endpoint: tools/gmgn.js Stage 3 — added gmgnFetch(/v1/token/security) to existing Promise.all with holders/traders. analyzeTokenSecurity() function. condenseGmgnCandidate surfaces 10 new security fields. formatGmgnCandidateForPrompt adds Security: line
_changelog.gmgn_security_config: config.js gmgn section — added maxBuyTaxPct (10), maxSellTaxPct (10), requireRenouncedOwner (false), requireRenouncedMint (false), requireRenouncedFreezeAccount (false). Override via user-config.json keys
_changelog._note_perf_s4parallel: 2026-06-02 screening cycle bottleneck fix. Stage 4 in GMGN was sequential for-loop awaiting checkBounceSetup per candidate — 01:50 cycle took 38.7s because CUM got 504 (~5s) and a second candidate took 33s for fresh compute. With 3 candidates that's 38-100s of blocking before LLM even starts. Fix: parallelize Stage 4 with Promise.allSettled + 8s AbortController timeout in fetchChartIndicatorsForMint. Worst case for 3 candidates now = max(8s) = 8s instead of sum. Also keeps bot resilient to chart-indicators API hanging.
_changelog.perf_s4parallel: tools/gmgn.js Stage 4 — for/await loop → Promise.allSettled. tools/chart-indicators.js fetchChartIndicatorsForMint — added AbortController with 8s timeoutMs default
_changelog._note_perf_apitmo: 2026-06-02 Meridian API chart-indicators endpoint down/overloaded. Tested: 350ms baseline ping Asia→EU (5.189.143.6), chart-indicators endpoint times out at 12s+ for all candle counts and intervals. Bot's 298 DEFAULT_CANDLES was worst case. Two-line fix: disable indicatorFilter in gmgn-config (skip Stage 4 entirely), reduce candles 298→50 in chartIndicators for when API recovers. LLM still has confirmIndicatorPreset tool as fallback.
_changelog.perf_apitmo_disabled: user-config.json chartIndicators.enabled: true → false. confirmIndicatorPreset returns immediately when disabled (no API call), saving 2× 8s timeouts per LLM decision cycle. Re-enable when API recovers.
_changelog._note_r14: 2026-06-02 decision-log analysis: 3/6 recent no_deploy cycles were single-candidate LLM rejections with reason `bot_holders_pct X% > 24%` (Jupiter audit metric, distinct from GMGN bot_degen_rate). DATBIHGAH 31.3%, Berries 36.3% — all genuine market tokens, just Jupiter's bot count is broad. 24 was over-tightened below config.js default 30. Raised to 40 to align with GMGN maxBotDegenRate 0.4 — gives LLM breathing room without admitting rug territory (60%+).
_changelog.r14_bot_holders: maxBotHoldersPct: 24 → 40 — Jupiter bot_holders_pct threshold; GMGN bot_degen_rate filter at 0.4 stays as upstream hard reject for worst cases
_changelog._note_r15: 2026-06-02 trailing TP guards. Observed: positions like Bipy-SOL briefly hit 0.3-0.4% peak then sit — current trailingTriggerPct=4% never arms, but if lower trigger were set, would arm on initial spike-then-fade pattern (peak hits 1.5% at minute 2, then drops 0.7% by minute 8 = lock loss). Added 2 sanity floors below the actual trigger: position must be held 30+ min AND peak must exceed 1.5% before trailing can arm. Lets winners mature past micro-rallies without locking in early noise.
_changelog.r15_trail_hold: minHoldMinutesForTrail: 30 (NEW) — position must age 30 min before trailing can arm. Prevents arming on deploy-spike noise.
_changelog.r15_trail_peak: minPeakPctForTrail: 1.5 (NEW) — peak PnL must exceed 1.5% before trailing can arm. Soft floor below trailingTriggerPct=4%, ensures the position actually moved meaningfully.
_changelog._note_r16: 2026-06-02 auto-track smart wallets. `requireKol: true` + `minKolCount: 1` previously had empty/narrow smart-wallets.json. New script: daily 02:00 UTC cron fetches top 5 LPers from LPAgent for the 5 most-recently-deployed pools (from pool-memory.json), filters for win_rate >= 70%, ROI >= 30%, total_pnl_usd >= $50, and adds qualifying wallets to data/smart-wallets.json (idempotent, skips duplicates). Also runs on first container startup if not yet run today. Conservative rate-limit: 5 pools × 5 LPers = 25 study calls/day max.
_changelog.r16_auto_track: scripts/auto-track-smart-wallets.js — filters LPAgent top-LP data on win_rate/ROI/PnL thresholds, merges into data/smart-wallets.json. State file data/auto-track-state.json tracks lastRunUtc for idempotency.
_changelog._note_r17: 2026-06-02 Magpie-SOL analysis: 4/5 closes = 'pumped far above range' (active bin -695 above upper -700). Pattern: direction right, range too narrow for vol. Two fixes: (1) extend perf record with peak_pnl_pct + bin_distance_above_upper + trailing_active + minutes_oor for future EV analysis. (2) Adaptive range width: when candidate volatility > 3.5, multiply bins_below by 1.25 (mid of 20-30%) before clamping. Tool: scripts/ev-by-close-reason.js computes avg PnL, win rate, fees, deep-dive for Rule 3 / stop loss. STOP LOSS CHANGE DEFERRED until EV data exists.
_changelog.r17_perf_fields: tools/dlmm.js close path — recordPerformance now includes peak_pnl_pct, close_active_bin, close_upper_bin, close_lower_bin, bin_distance_above_upper, trailing_active, minutes_oor. Relayed + local close paths both updated.
_changelog.r17_adaptive_range: index.js computeBinsBelow + prompt.js screener prompt — when candidate.volatility > 3.5, bins_below is multiplied by 1.25 (configurable: strategy.highVolatilityThreshold, strategy.highVolatilityBinsBoost). Update prompts in both places so LLM math matches the server-side floor.
_changelog.r17_ev_analyzer: scripts/ev-by-close-reason.js — new offline tool. Reads data/lessons.json, groups closes by reason (rule3, trailing_tp, stop_loss, take_profit, oor, low_yield, other). Prints per-family stats + per-pool (>=3 closes) + Rule 3 deep-dive (peak vs exit, bin distance) + stop loss deep-dive. Use --pool <addr> for single pool, --json for raw output.
_changelog._note_r18: 2026-06-02 SAOS-SOL autopsy: token rugged 2026-05-28 11:49→12:28, PnL went from normal to -93% between two 30s polls. Bot lost $17.52 (30% of cumulative profit) on a single event. Stop loss DID fire but PnL feed lagged 30s, by then PnL was -93%. Bottleneck = action time, not detection. Fix: (1) Fast 10s PnL poll for positions with vol>5 (high_vol_polling flag on tracked position). (2) Fast poll BYPASSES LLM for STOP_LOSS and calls closePosition directly — saves 30-60s of agent roundtrip. 15s cooldown prevents spam retry. Falls back to management cycle if direct close fails.
_changelog.r18_fast_poll: index.js new fastPollInterval — every highVolPollingIntervalSec (10s default) for positions with high_vol_polling: true. Mirrors 30s poller's exit detection but with shorter cooldown and direct-close fast path for STOP_LOSS.
_changelog.r18_high_vol_flag: state.js trackPosition + tools/dlmm.js deploy — high_vol_polling: bool field, set true at deploy when normalizedVolatility > highVolPollingThreshold (5).
_changelog.r18_config: config.js management — highVolPollingThreshold (5) and highVolPollingIntervalSec (10). Stop loss threshold UNCHANGED (still -10%).
_changelog.perf_apitmo_filter: gmgn-config.json indicatorFilter: true → false. user-config.json gmgnIndicatorFilter: false (fallback when gmgn-config.json absent on Dokploy). Skip Stage 4 chart-indicators call entirely; GMGN funnel still filters for bullish supertrend upstream via requireBullishSupertrend: true
_changelog.perf_apitmo_candles: user-config.json chartIndicators.candles: 298 (DEFAULT) → 50 — prevents 30s timeout if LLM calls confirmIndicatorPreset; 50 candles = 12.5h of 15-min data, plenty for supertrend
_changelog._note_lossfix: 2026-05-25 Stake-SOL analysis: 6h close at -$1.40 left $8.30 unclaimed fees on table; ALL winners cut at 0.01-3.38% by too-tight trailing. Root cause: positionSizePct=0.90 deployed 0.70 SOL single position — one loss hits hard, trailing fires at 1.5% drop on large position, winners can't compound. Fix: smaller positions + wider trail + looser stop.
_changelog.lossfix_sizing: positionSizePct: 0.90 → 0.40 — 2-3 smaller positions instead of one giant bet; allows trailing window to breathe
_changelog.lossfix_trail: trailingTriggerPct: 1.5 → 4.0, trailingDropPct: 0.7 → 2.0 — let winners run past micro-rallies before locking gains
_changelog.lossfix_stop: stopLossPct: -8 → -10 — give large positions more room in volatile SOL conditions
_changelog.r13_token_cooldown: repeatDeployCooldownTriggerCount: 3 → 1 — block 2nd same-token deploy within 24h. repeatDeployCooldownMinFeeEarnedPct: 0 → 3.0 — only allow redeploy if prior position earned ≥3% fees (proven). Scope already 'token' so cross-pool same-token covered.
_changelog._note_r12b: 2026-05-18 R12b drought rollback: 1+ hour zero deploys, ALL candidates were pump.fun. Market regime = pump.fun dominant. R12 full block too aggressive. DUST loss was outlier, not category-wide. LP tracker shows pump.fun tokens (WORLDCUP, Goblin) with 20 LPers + 9%+ ROI = profitable. Re-allow pump.fun, keep letsbonk.fun blocked (less proven). Existing quality filters (top10, bundle, mcap, fees) catch most rugs.
_changelog.r12b_unblock_pumpfun: blockedLaunchpads: [pump.fun, letsbonk.fun] → [letsbonk.fun] — pump.fun re-allowed; other filters still gate quality
_changelog._note_r12: 2026-05-13 R12 launchpad block + OOR fix. DUST-SOL (pump.fun token) -$5.83 single loss wiped multiple wins. Mint ended in 'pump' = pump.fun, holders 75 only, mcap dumped 48% in 2h22m. Also caught Rule 3 (pumped-far-above-range) closing bid_ask positions 2min after deploy, ignoring minAgeBeforeOOR. Both fixed in code (Rule 3 patch) and config (block risky launchpads).
_changelog.r12_block_pump_launchpads: blockedLaunchpads: [] → [pump.fun, letsbonk.fun] — pump.fun tokens dump fast, low organic, high bundle risk; letsbonk.fun similar profile
_changelog.r12_rule3_age_check: code fix in index.js getDeterministicCloseRule — Rule 3 now requires (age_minutes >= minAgeBeforeOOR) so bid_ask positions get pullback window before forced close
_changelog._note_r11: 2026-05-05 R11 growth-mode: R10 results 24-48h post-tune: 13 closes (vs 8), +◎4.6 (vs +◎2.8), WR 69% (vs 63%), PF 9.85 (vs 7.09). Drought killed. Now push for wallet recovery to 1+ SOL. Two issues observed: (1) binsBelow=35 was both lower AND upper clamp — vol-based scaling formula disabled, all positions got 35 bins regardless of volatility, causing 3 quick PUMPED-above-range exits. (2) DEAD POOL 45m too tight — last close hit dead-pool at 166m for +◎0.77, more time would compound further.
_changelog.r11_unlock_bins: binsBelow: 35 → 90 — was acting as both clamp ends, forcing fixed 35-bin range; now formula round(35 + vol/5*55) scales 35 (low vol) to 90 (high vol)
_changelog.r11_dead_pool_extend: deadPoolMaxMinutes: 45 → 90 — let slow printers compound (recent 166m hold yielded +◎0.77)
_changelog._note_r10: 2026-05-05 R10 drought-kill: 7d post-volume-mount data: 8 closes only (drought confirmed — 6 screening cycles found 0 candidates). $48 idle ~80% of time. R9 filters too tight for current market. Wallet 0.62→0.628 SOL = 1.3%/week (slow recovery from 0.98 SOL bug-loss). Loosen entry filters back to pre-R9 + give positions more breathing room before OOR ejection.
_changelog.r10_drought_fix: minTokenFeesSol: 12 → 8 (revert R9), minOrganic: 55 → 50 (partial revert R9) — let more candidates through screening, capital should not sit idle
_changelog.r10_oor_breathe: outOfRangeWaitMinutes: 12 → 25 — losers data shows positions ejected at 12-22m OOR with $0 fees; wider window lets price reclaim range before forced close
_changelog._note_r9: 2026-05-04 R9 velocity tune: 584 closes data shows avg win/loss 0.75x (winners too small). Profit factor 1.21, win rate 62%. Loosen TP to let winners run further; tighten trail to lock peaks faster; faster screening for more shots; raise quality filters to reduce loss frequency.
_changelog.r9_winners_run: feeYieldClosePct: 5.0 → 7.0 — let winners reach higher fee yield before forced close
_changelog.r9_trail_tighter: trailingDropPct: 1.0 → 0.7 — once armed, smaller peak-drop triggers close; lock more of each rally
_changelog.r9_more_shots: screeningIntervalMin: 10 → 7 — faster candidate refresh while wallet headroom available
_changelog.r9_quality_filter: minOrganic: 45 → 55, minTokenFeesSol: 8 → 12 — tighter entry quality to reduce loss frequency
_changelog._note_r8: 2026-04-29 R8 SPIKE-SOL loss postmortem fix. Position #4 lost -8.18% (-$3.84) on bid_ask redeploy to same pool 11h after first close. Root causes: (1) maxDeploysPerPool24h=2 allowed redeploy despite marginal first close (+0.32% low yield, NOT a real win), (2) trailingTriggerPct=2.5 too high — peak only +0.67%, trail never armed, full unwind to stop loss, (3) screener vol=3.77 vs enriched vol=0.70 mismatch — bot deployed on stale data. Code-level bug separate: pool-memory.json shows deployed_at=null and volatility_at_deploy=null (recordDeploy not capturing).
_changelog.r8_redeploy_block: maxDeploysPerPool24h: 2 → 1 — block redeploy within 24h regardless of prior PnL; same-pool deploy is trend-chasing risk
_changelog.r8_trail_arm_lower: trailingTriggerPct: 2.5 → 1.5 — arm trail earlier on small peaks; SPIKE peaked 0.67% never armed; lower trigger lets trail catch micro-wins before reversal
_changelog.r8_trail_drop_tighter: trailingDropPct: 1.5 → 1.0 — once armed, smaller drop from peak triggers close; faster lock on reversals
_changelog._note_r7: 2026-04-28 R7 profit-capture micro-tweaks: Apr 26-27 zero losses with current risk config. Loosen exit thresholds slightly to let winners run further per position. Strategy unchanged (maxPositions=1, positionSizePct=0.90, all risk caps preserved). Target: lift avg/position from ~$0.13 to ~$0.18-0.22.
_changelog.r7_responsiveness: managementIntervalMin=7 (from 10) — tighter peak tracking + faster decay detection
_changelog.r7_compound_velocity: minClaimAmount=0.3 (from 0.5 USD) — claim small fees more often, return SOL to wallet sooner
_changelog._note: 2026-04-25 R6.1 hotfix: vol floor was rejecting ALL candidates because API returns vol=0 for fresh/sleepy pools. 70 minutes zero-deploy after first close (发财-SOL @ 0.97% low yield). Fix: only reject when vol > 0 AND < 1.5 (treat 0/null as 'unknown', let through).
_changelog._note_r6: 2026-04-25 R6: hard volatility floor in screening.js (was prompt-only, LLM ignored — PNL25 showed 5/5 deploys violated it: vol 1.00-1.27, bin_step 80-100, all closed in 12-17min with $0 fees).
_changelog.r6_volatility_floor: minVolatility=1.5, volatilityCompensateBinStep=125 — drop pools with vol<1.5 unless bin_step>=125
_changelog.r6_oor_grace: minAgeBeforeOOR=25 — OOR rule cannot close positions younger than 25min; PNL25 showed 3/5 closes at 12-17min were premature OOR exits with $0 fees
_changelog.r6_exit_preset_off: chartIndicators.exitPreset: supertrend_break → null — removes 5-min indicator hint from management prompt to isolate effect of OOR grace+vol floor; deterministic rules (stop loss, trailing TP, OOR, dead pool, fee yield, volume decay) unchanged
_changelog.r6_decay_grace: minAgeBeforeDecayClose=30 — peak_volume baseline needs samples; without grace, an early volume spike at deploy time inflates peak so a natural drop trips DECAY_CLOSE prematurely (suspected co-cause of 12-17min closes)
_changelog.r6_learning_enrich: dlmm.js deployPosition now enriches volatility/fee_tvl_ratio/organic_score/bin_step from getPoolDetail when LLM didn't pass them — keeps evolveThresholds() learning loop fed instead of silently filtering null fields via isFiniteNum
_changelog.r4_relaxed: minFeeActiveTvlRatio: 0.04→0.025, minTokenFeesSol: 15→8, minHolders: 300→250, minVolume: 5000→3000, minOrganic: 50→45, minTokenAgeHours: 4→2, athFilterPct: -5→0
_changelog.r4_kept: maxTop10Pct=60, maxBinStep=150, minTvl=10000, entryPreset=rsi_plus_supertrend (AND logic), all R1-R2 exit timers + trailing
